concepts.name: isBlockedPeer pure predicate + lowercase-normalized blockedPeers derivation
isAllowedDmSender stays synchronous, pure, and never calls isBlockedPeer internally (AC-SEC-13 / DD-8)
StoredContact.archivedAt != null is the single source of truth for blocked (DD-1); addContactByNpub never silently clears it
Blocked sender dropped before rememberContact/incrementDirectMessage in both kind-4 and kind-1059 handlers
Composite gate re-applied defensively at all four ContactChat ingestion sites, independent of whether the view should be mounted
Single-peer DM history wipe always derives its storage key via directConversationId(peer), never a hand-built dm:<peer> literal, and never throws out of the block action
ContactDetailView renders a Blocked banner in place of the composer for an archived contact, on both in-app navigation and the direct-URL route's first render
handleArchiveToggle sequences confirm -> archiveContact -> history wipe -> block-revision bump for block, and a direct unarchiveContact call with no confirmation for unblock
MarmotContext exposes a block-revision counter that live DM surfaces observe without unmount/remount
All block/blocked/unblock/confirm-dialog user-visible strings are sourced from useCopy() in both en and de, never hardcoded in components
isAllowedDmSenderComposite (isAllowedDmSender && !isBlockedPeer) — single shared assembly
concepts.watch: MUST be one shared definition (rehomed to blockedPeers.ts); S4 ContactChat imports it, never re-implements — else forked gate.
concepts.status: rehomed_to_lib (forked-gate finding resolved; S4 ContactChat imports from blockedPeers.ts)

concepts.name: wipeSinglePeerHistory drains only in-flight-BEFORE-wipe appends; post-wipe appends resurrect the thread
concepts.watch: S4 MUST make the block gate live before/atomic with the wipe (bump revision + tear down open ContactChat subs), else a racing inbound message resurrects wiped history (privacy regression). AC-VIEW-14.

concepts.name: IncomingCallWatcher gates on bare isAllowedDmSender, NOT the block composite — a blocked-but-known peer can still ring
concepts.status: OPEN — out of epic AC scope; user chose backlog finding + code comment (calls disabled now). BACKLOG: gate-incoming-calls-with-block-deny.

concept_observations.note: S4 MUST decide the pairing-echo path: re-scanning a blocked contact still emits attemptOrQueuePairingEcho (add.tsx:179) since DD-9 returns error=already_exists. DD-2/§7 (no signal, full cut-off) => S4 must suppress pairingEcho for a blocked peer.
contacts.ts blocked/pubkeyHex flags produced but dropped by processContactInput.ts; S4 must propagate so add-by-npub UI reports blocked, else JSDoc is wrong / dead code.
reactivated always false after DD-9; vestigial, optional cleanup.

surfaces_touched: directMessageNotifications.ts UNCHANGED (gate already upstream of side effects)

concept_observations.note: AC-INBOUND-3/AC-UNBLOCK-3 require S4 to call notifyBlockedPeersChanged in BOTH branches; green S2 tests do not prove it e2e.
composite exported from a component file; being rehomed to blockedPeers.ts so S4 imports one definition.
both DM-ingestion surfaces (bell watcher + profile-heal receive.ts) deny blocked/archived senders, both keyed off archivedAt (DD-1).

surfaces_touched: chatPersistence.ts (wipeSinglePeerHistory + HistoryWipeResult; static imports clearDirectMessageContact, directConversationId — cycle-checked)

concept_observations.note: AC-WIPE-6 bounded to in-flight-before-wipe; real completeness needs S4 gate ordering (AC-VIEW-14).

surfaces_touched: i18n.ts (+4 contacts confirm keys; relabeled contacts hidden*, archivedDetailNotice, profile.archive/unarchiveAction en+de)

concept_observations.note: AC-COPY-1/2 named nonexistent copy.contacts.archiveAction; relabeled real copy.profile.* (profile.tsx:752). AC text now corrected.
S4 reads confirm copy from copy.contacts.blockConfirm* but button label from copy.profile.archiveAction — TS-checked cross-namespace lookup.

surfaces_touched: ContactChat.tsx (shouldIngestDmFromSender extraction; 4 gates via shared composite)
contacts.tsx (Blocked banner replaces composer, sync memo on blockedPeersRevision)

convergence_log.disposition: all remediated; 1 migration-cohort product decision -> keep-history + follow-up finding
